message.content:
@startuml
skinparam handwritten true

title 系统用户登录时序图

actor Client
participant API
participant MsgServer

== login ==

Client ->> API : 1 login\nactivate API
API -) API : 2 account verify\ndeactivate API

alt [verify success:] 
    note right of Client: connect MsgServer with jwt
    
    API -->> Client : 3 generate jwt and return
    activate Client
    deactivate API
    
    Client ->> MsgServer : 4 connect MsgServer and build tcp connect \nactivate MsgServer
    Note over Client,MsgServer #D9EAD3#06578C#:connect MsgServer with jwt 
    
    MsgServer -) MsgServer : 5 parse jwt and attr the accountInfo to Channel  
    MsgServer --> Client : 6 connect success   
else [verify fail:]    
   API ..>> Client : 7 login failed;     
end 

@enduml
